actions.description: Eighth board meeting. P1 CSP bug is top priority — Infra+R&D tasked with nginx proxy fix. UX/UI building keyboard accessibility. DevOps designing CI pipeline. Game #6 deferred until P1 resolved.
Sent P1 fix directives to Infra and R&D inboxes

nextStep: Next meeting: verify P1 CSP fix deployed, all 5 games visible. Check keyboard accessibility progress.
